headline: SpaceX AI first agent baseline — entity not currently in ai-labs index. SpaceX qualifies as AI vendor via 2026 merger with xAI Holdings (Grok family). Distinct from xAI/Grok floor entity: SpaceX AI captures the integrated SpaceX-xAI-Starlink stack now deployed on Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 networks (May 1 2026 agreement). FLOOR-ADJACENT placement: (1) inherits xAI/Grok floor-designation context (parent governance now shared); (2) Pentagon classified deployment uses 'lawful operational use' language without Anthropic-equivalent safety guardrails; (3) Starlink military integration adds physical-infrastructure-as-AI-substrate dimension; (4) Musk's concurrent governance of SpaceX, xAI, and DOGE creates conflict-of-interest in military AI accountability; (5) no public AI-safety policy specific to classified deployments; (6) Grok safety record (Nazi-content incidents, no system card) is now SpaceX AI's record by merger. First baseline placement: Critical band, composite 9.4, just above the floor. Floor candidacy retained; floor designation NOT proposed this cycle but trajectory toward floor is documented. Recommend first-baseline placement at composite 9.4.
key_evidence: May 1 2026: SpaceX signed Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 AI agreement. Agreement permits 'lawful operational use' without safety guardrails Anthropic refused to waive.
2026 SpaceX-xAI Holdings merger: SpaceX is the AI-vendor entity for the Grok model family on classified DoD networks.
xAI/Grok floor designation context (already in published index): no system card, Nazi-content production incidents, no boundary-setting framework. By merger this record is now SpaceX AI's record.
Starlink military integration: physical satellite infrastructure layer for classified DoD networks, adding hardware dimension to the AI vendor relationship.
Musk's concurrent governance: SpaceX (CEO), xAI (CEO), and DOGE/Trump administration role through 2025 — conflict-of-interest in military AI accountability.
February 23 2026 prior agreement: xAI/Grok had Pentagon classified-systems deal pre-dating the May 1 cohort agreement (Axios reporting), establishing pattern.

evidence.source: DefenseScoop — DOD expands classified AI work with 8 companies excluding Anthropic
evidence.finding: SpaceX listed among 8 IL6/IL7 vendors; SpaceX qualifies as AI vendor via 2026 xAI Holdings merger giving control of Grok family models.

evidence.source: Axios — Musk's xAI and Pentagon reach deal to use Grok in classified systems
evidence.finding: Pre-May 1 2026 xAI/Grok Pentagon classified deal documented; pattern of classified deployment without safety guardrails predates cohort agreement.
SpaceX-xAI merger context confirmed; SpaceX is the contracting entity for Grok on classified networks.

evidence.source: US Department of War — Classified Networks AI Agreements
evidence.finding: Primary-source DoD release confirming SpaceX as IL6/IL7 vendor.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 1.5 critical. A1 detection: Grok harm-signal channels structurally absent (no system card, no transparency reporting). A4 amplification: classified-deployment without disclosure framework.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 1.5 critical. E1 affective resonance: Grok content incidents (Nazi-content production, antisemitic-content production) demonstrate fundamental absence of empathic-regard architecture, now SpaceX AI's record.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 1.5 critical. AC2 proportionality: classified deployment without published safety guardrails is structurally disproportionate; AC4 response: no published incident-response framework for Grok or for classified deployment.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 1.0 floor. EQ2 distributional awareness: Musk's concurrent DOGE role + Grok content patterns + Starlink monopoly position concentrate harm asymmetrically on already-marginalized populations.
scoring_rationale.BND: 1.5 critical. B3 scope clarity: 'lawful operational use' framing accepted; no published autonomous-weapons or domestic-surveillance restriction. B5 consent: no public consultation framework for classified deployment.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 1.5 critical. AB2 transparency: Grok has no published model/system card; SpaceX AI has no published military-deployment AI-safety policy. AB4 reparation undefined.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 1.5 critical. S1 causal reasoning: Musk's concurrent governance of SpaceX + xAI + Starlink + DOGE creates structural conflict-of-interest amplifier; no entity-level systemic-harm reasoning framework for combined stack.
scoring_rationale.INT: 1.0 floor. I1 consistency: declared 'truth-seeking AI' marketing fundamentally contradicted by Grok content incidents; classified-deployment without guardrails contradicts any safety commitments. I2 non-performance: gap between Musk public posture and operational reality is structural.

math_check.validator_check: First baseline. Composite 9.4. Critical band placement, floor-proximate. Floor designation NOT proposed this cycle pending: (a) explicit SpaceX-AI-entity boundary-setting test, (b) any classified-deployment harm event, (c) xAI/Grok floor-designation propagation analysis. Floor candidacy retained.

negativeSignals: Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 deployment without published guardrails; xAI/Grok floor record inherited via merger; Starlink military infrastructure integration; Musk concurrent SpaceX+xAI+DOGE governance conflict; no SpaceX AI military-deployment safety policy; Grok content incident pattern (Nazi-content, antisemitic-content production).
positiveSignals: Limited. SpaceX has functioning aerospace-safety governance (NASA collaborations, FAA compliance) which is BND-positive at parent-entity level but does not propagate to AI-safety domain. Starlink humanitarian deployments (Ukraine, disaster zones) provide narrow EMP-positive signal. None sufficient to offset structural-critical signals.
sector_context: AI Labs / Pentagon classified cohort + Musk-governance cluster. Cross-reference: xAI/Grok (floor entity, related), Tesla Optimus (separate Musk-governed entity in robotics-labs). SpaceX AI distinguished by inherited xAI/Grok floor record + Starlink military-infrastructure integration + Musk multi-entity governance conflict.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with critical-band, floor-proximate placement
open_actions_carried: Floor candidacy retained — designation deferred pending explicit SpaceX-AI boundary-setting test or classified-deployment harm event
Watch: any Grok-on-classified-network harm or incident report
Watch: SpaceX AI entity-level AI-safety policy publication
Watch: Musk DOGE conclusion and conflict-of-interest litigation
